body:
Your carbon offset offer
<https://mandrillapp.com/track/click/30903366/selectra.info?>
                  Dear Sir or Madam,

 Thank you for your commitment to a more sustainable future! We have duly
noted your interest in subscribing to our carbon offset program. There is
only one step left to complete your subscription.

 To finalize your subscription, please sign your contract electronically by
clicking on the link below, where you will find :

   - The General Terms and Conditions of Sale ;
  - The SEPA mandate ;
  - The Specific Terms and Conditions of Sale ;
  - The withdrawal form.
 
        Sign the document
<https://mandrillapp.com/track/click/30903366/app.pandadoc.eu?>        Thank you and
have a great day !

                        Selectra, comparison service for energy and telecom
offers
 66 rue Sébastien Mercier | 75015 Paris | 09 87 67 54 75 | Website
<https://mandrillapp.com/track/click/30903366/selectra.info?>
